item.title: A Family's Dark Secrets Remained Hidden For Decades
item.description: The Goler clan became the focus of a major investigation in Canada after allegations of widespread abuse emerged from within the family. The case exposed years of secrecy, isolation, and systemic failures that allowed the situation to continue unchecked for so long.

media:content.media:title: A Family's Dark Secrets Remained Hidden For Decades
media:content.media:description: The Goler clan became the focus of a major investigation in Canada after allegations of widespread abuse emerged from within the family. The case exposed years of secrecy, isolation, and systemic failures that allowed the situation to continue unchecked for so long.

item.title: Her Chilling Confessions Left Investigators Questioning Everything
item.description: Miranda Barbour gained national attention after claiming she had committed numerous killings across the country. As authorities investigated her statements, questions emerged about which parts of her story were true, exaggerated, or impossible to verify.

media:content.media:title: Her Chilling Confessions Left Investigators Questioning Everything
media:content.media:description: Miranda Barbour gained national attention after claiming she had committed numerous killings across the country. As authorities investigated her statements, questions emerged about which parts of her story were true, exaggerated, or impossible to verify.

item.title: A Masked Killer Tried To Convince Everyone He Was Insane
item.description: Dawson McGehee became the focus of a bizarre criminal case after a masked attack led investigators to question whether his claims of mental illness were genuine. As the evidence unfolded, prosecutors argued that his actions were part of a calculated attempt to avoid responsibility for the crime.

media:content.media:title: A Masked Killer Tried To Convince Everyone He Was Insane
media:content.media:description: Dawson McGehee became the focus of a bizarre criminal case after a masked attack led investigators to question whether his claims of mental illness were genuine. As the evidence unfolded, prosecutors argued that his actions were part of a calculated attempt to avoid responsibility for the crime.
